title: Small Talk 2
description: 面向初识延展、建立共同点、分享偏好、修复冷场、发出轻邀约、礼貌拒绝、后续跟进和重新连接的进阶 small talk 训练包。

units.title: 初次认识后的自然延展
units.communicativeGoal: 在初次认识后自然继续聊下去，而不是停在表面问候
activationPrompts: 你刚认识一个人，想把对话从礼貌介绍推进一点
你想用一个更自然的问题继续聊

items.englishText: So how do you know the host?
items.chinesePrompt: 所以你是怎么认识主办人的？
variants: How do you know the host, then?
notes: 活动现场非常常见的延展问题。
pronunciationTargets: how do you know the host
commonMistakes: How you know the host?

items.englishText: What got you into that in the first place?
items.chinesePrompt: 你最开始是怎么接触这个的？
variants: What got you into that to begin with?
notes: 很适合把话题从职业或兴趣往前追溯。
commonMistakes: Why you started that at first?

items.englishText: You don't have to give me the full backstory, but I'm curious how you ended up in that field.
items.chinesePrompt: 你不用从头讲起，不过我挺好奇你最后怎么走到这个领域的。
variants: You don't have to give me the whole story, but I'm curious how you ended up in that field.
notes: 先减轻对方负担，再发出真实兴趣。
commonMistakes: I am curious how you entered this field.
sampleOutputs: You don't have to give me the full backstory, but I'm curious how you ended up in that field.

items.englishText: Nice. So how do you know the host? Have you known them for long?
items.chinesePrompt: 不错。所以你是怎么认识主办人的？你们认识很久了吗？
notes: 两个轻问题连起来，能自然把话题延长。
commonMistakes: How you know the host? You know long time?
items.contextText: 你在活动上刚认识一个人，想把寒暄推进成真实交流。

units.title: 建立共同点
units.communicativeGoal: 从对方的话里抓住可共鸣点，建立更强的连接感
activationPrompts: 你想让对方感觉你们不是只在做表面寒暄
你从对方经历里听到了一个自己也能接的话题

items.englishText: Oh, same here. I've had exactly the same experience.
items.chinesePrompt: 哦，我也是。我也有过一模一样的经历。
variants: Same here, actually. I've had almost exactly the same experience.
notes: 比单纯说 Me too 更有连接感。
commonMistakes: Me too, I have same experience.

items.englishText: That sounds very familiar, actually.
items.chinesePrompt: 这听起来其实特别熟悉。
variants: That actually sounds really familiar.
notes: 轻度共鸣，不会显得过度抢话。
commonMistakes: This sounds very known to me.

items.englishText: I went through something similar when I first moved here, so I know exactly what you mean.
items.chinesePrompt: 我刚搬来这里的时候也经历过类似的事，所以我完全懂你的意思。
variants: I went through something similar when I first moved here, so I know what you mean.
notes: 适合把共鸣连接到一点个人经历。
commonMistakes: I had similar thing when first moved here.
sampleOutputs: I went through something similar when I first moved here, so I know exactly what you mean.

items.englishText: That sounds very familiar, actually. I had almost the same problem when I first started there.
items.chinesePrompt: 这听起来其实很熟悉。我刚开始在那边的时候也几乎遇到过同样的问题。
notes: 先共鸣，再补一个简短 personal echo。
commonMistakes: This is familiar. I had same problem in first beginning.
items.contextText: 对方在说自己刚换环境时的不适应。

units.title: 聊偏好和轻度观点
units.communicativeGoal: 把话题从事实层推进到偏好和轻度观点交换
activationPrompts: 你想让对话更有个人色彩
你想看看对方在一个轻松话题上的偏好

items.englishText: I'm more of an early-morning person, to be honest.
items.chinesePrompt: 说实话，我更偏向那种早起型的人。
variants: To be honest, I'm more of an early-morning person.
notes: 很适合表达温和偏好。
commonMistakes: I am more a morning person.

items.englishText: It kind of depends on my mood, actually.
items.chinesePrompt: 其实有点看我当时的心情。
variants: It really depends on my mood, actually.
notes: 适合不想给绝对答案时使用。
commonMistakes: It depends my feeling.

items.englishText: If I'm choosing for myself, I usually go for somewhere quieter and less crowded.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果让我自己选，我通常会选那种更安静、人没那么多的地方。
variants: If I'm choosing for myself, I usually go for somewhere a bit quieter and less crowded.
notes: 适合表达个人偏好而不显得太强势。
commonMistakes: If choose myself, I choose quiet and not many people place.
sampleOutputs: If I'm choosing for myself, I usually go for somewhere quieter and less crowded.

items.englishText: I'm more of a stay-in-and-recharge person, to be honest. What about you?
items.chinesePrompt: 说实话，我更像是那种待在家里充电的人。你呢？
notes: 先抛一点个人信息，再把球传回去。
commonMistakes: I am more like staying home to charge myself.
items.contextText: 你们正在聊周末或者休闲方式偏好。

units.title: 修复冷场和短暂停顿
units.communicativeGoal: 在短暂尴尬或话题断掉时自然把对话接回来
activationPrompts: 话题突然断了，你不想让场面尴尬
你想把短暂停顿变成新的切入口

items.englishText: Speaking of which, have you been anywhere good recently?
items.chinesePrompt: 说到这个，你最近有去过什么不错的地方吗？
variants: Speaking of that, have you been anywhere good lately?
notes: 适合从前一个轻话题自然再开一个。
commonMistakes: Talking of this, you went good place recently?

items.englishText: That reminds me, I meant to ask you about that.
items.chinesePrompt: 这倒提醒我了，我本来正想问你这件事。
variants: That reminds me, I was actually meaning to ask you about that.
notes: 很适合把停顿变成 follow-up。
commonMistakes: This reminds me, I wanted ask you that.

items.englishText: We've gone quiet for a second, but that's okay. I was actually curious about what you said earlier.
items.chinesePrompt: 我们安静了一下，不过没关系。其实我还挺想继续问问你刚才提到的那件事。
variants: We've gone quiet for a second, but that's fine. I was actually curious about what you mentioned earlier.
notes: 适合对冷场有意识修复。
commonMistakes: We became quiet, but I want ask what you said before.

items.englishText: That reminds me, you mentioned you were planning a trip. Did you end up booking anything?
items.chinesePrompt: 这倒提醒我了，你之前提到你在计划旅行。后来订了吗？
notes: 从停顿直接接回已知线索，很自然。
commonMistakes: You said before about trip. You booked finally?
items.contextText: 刚刚出现了一小段安静，你想把话题接回来。

units.title: 发出轻邀约
units.communicativeGoal: 在关系还不算深时，自然提出轻量邀约或继续聊的机会
activationPrompts: 你想在聊得不错后顺手发一个轻量邀约
你想表达以后可以继续聊，但不想显得太用力

items.englishText: If you're up for it, we should grab coffee sometime.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果你愿意的话，我们找时间喝个咖啡吧。
variants: If you're up for it, we should grab a coffee sometime.
notes: 很轻，不会显得太正式。
commonMistakes: If you want, we can drink coffee one day.

items.englishText: We should continue this conversation another time.
items.chinesePrompt: 我们改天应该把这个话题继续聊下去。
variants: We should pick this conversation up another time.
notes: 适合从具体话题自然延展到后续接触。
commonMistakes: We should continue talk next time.

items.englishText: If you're around next week, I'd be happy to swap recommendations properly.
items.chinesePrompt: 如果你下周也在的话，我很愿意找个时间认真交流一下推荐清单。
variants: If you're around next week, I'd be happy to compare recommendations properly.
notes: 把邀约绑定在具体轻主题上更自然。
commonMistakes: If you are free next week, I am happy to share recommendations properly.
sampleOutputs: If you're around next week, I'd be happy to swap recommendations properly.

items.englishText: I've really enjoyed this chat. If you're up for it, we should grab coffee sometime next week.
items.chinesePrompt: 我真的挺享受这次聊天的。如果你愿意的话，我们下周找时间喝个咖啡吧。
notes: 先明确正向感受，再发出轻邀约。
commonMistakes: I enjoy this chat. We should drink coffee next week if you want.
items.contextText: 你在一段自然的对话结束前想留下后续联系机会。

units.title: 礼貌拒绝但保持关系
units.communicativeGoal: 在不方便接受邀请或建议时，既说清楚也不把关系聊冷
activationPrompts: 你想礼貌地拒绝一个邀约
你不想让拒绝听起来像是彻底断掉

items.englishText: I'd love to, but this week's a bit full on my side.
items.chinesePrompt: 我很想去，不过我这周这边有点排满了。
variants: I'd love to, but this week's a bit packed on my side.
notes: 既接受善意，又说明现实限制。
pronunciationTargets: a bit full on my side
commonMistakes: I want to, but this week is full for me.

items.englishText: Can I take a rain check on that?
items.chinesePrompt: 这次我能先改天吗？
variants: Could I take a rain check on that?
notes: 很自然的英语拒绝保留句。
commonMistakes: Can I do it another day?

items.englishText: I'm going to have to pass this time, but please ask me again another week.
items.chinesePrompt: 这次我可能得先婉拒，不过你改周再约我也完全可以。
variants: I'm going to have to pass this time, but do ask me again another week.
notes: 既拒绝，又明确保留后续空间。
commonMistakes: This time I pass, but ask me next time.
sampleOutputs: I'm going to have to pass this time, but please ask me again another week.

items.englishText: I'd love to, but this week is a bit full for me. Can I take a rain check and get back to you next week?
items.chinesePrompt: 我很想去，不过我这周有点排满了。我能不能先改天，下周再和你确认？
notes: 完整而自然的 soft decline 模板。
pronunciationTargets: get back to you next week
commonMistakes: I want, but this week full. Maybe next week I tell you.
items.contextText: 对方邀请你参加活动，但你这周确实安排不开。

units.title: 活动后续跟进
units.communicativeGoal: 在见面后的下一次接触里自然续上上次的话题
activationPrompts: 你上次见面聊过一个点，这次想自然接回来
你想让对方感觉你真的记住了之前的聊天

items.englishText: Last time we spoke, you mentioned you were waiting to hear back.
items.chinesePrompt: 我们上次聊的时候，你提到你在等回复。
variants: When we spoke last time, you mentioned you were waiting to hear back.
notes: 先唤起共同记忆，再进入 follow-up。
commonMistakes: Last time we talked, you said you wait reply.

items.englishText: Did that ever work out in the end?
items.chinesePrompt: 那件事后来最后顺利了吗？
variants: Did that work out in the end?
notes: 很常用的 follow-up 追问。
commonMistakes: That thing finally became okay?

items.englishText: You probably don't even remember mentioning it, but I was curious how that interview process turned out.
items.chinesePrompt: 你可能都不记得自己提过这事了，不过我还挺好奇后来那个面试流程怎么样了。
variants: You probably don't even remember mentioning it, but I was curious how that interview process ended up going.
notes: 先减轻对方压力，再问 follow-up。
commonMistakes: You maybe don't remember saying it, but I am curious how interview was.
sampleOutputs: You probably don't even remember mentioning it, but I was curious how that interview process turned out.

items.englishText: Last time we spoke, you mentioned you were looking for a new flat. Did that ever work out in the end?
items.chinesePrompt: 我们上次聊的时候，你提到你在找新房子。后来这件事顺利了吗？
notes: 完整的记忆型 follow-up 模板。
commonMistakes: Last time you said finding new house. It worked finally?
items.contextText: 你再次见到上次聊得不错的人，想自然续上之前的话题。

units.title: 隔一段时间后重新连接
units.communicativeGoal: 在较长时间没联系后自然重新开口，而不显得突兀
activationPrompts: 你有一阵子没和对方说话了
你想重新建立联系，但不想显得尴尬

items.englishText: It's been a while. How have things been on your side?
items.chinesePrompt: 有段时间没见了。你那边最近怎么样？
variants: It's been a while. How have things been with you?
notes: 重新建立联系的经典轻开场。
commonMistakes: Long time no see. How are things with your side?

items.englishText: You crossed my mind the other day, actually.
items.chinesePrompt: 其实前两天我还想起你来着。
variants: You actually crossed my mind the other day.
notes: 带一点温度，但不夸张。
commonMistakes: I remembered you some days ago.

items.englishText: I realised we hadn't caught up in ages, so I just wanted to say hi and see how you're doing.
items.chinesePrompt: 我突然意识到我们很久没聊了，所以就想来打个招呼，看看你最近怎么样。
variants: I realised we hadn't caught up in ages, so I wanted to say hi and see how things are going.
notes: 适合在消息或线下重连时使用。
commonMistakes: I realised we long time not catch up, so I say hi.
sampleOutputs: I realised we hadn't caught up in ages, so I just wanted to say hi and see how you're doing.

items.englishText: Hey, it's been a while. You crossed my mind the other day, actually, so I thought I'd say hello.
items.chinesePrompt: 嗨，好久不见。其实我前两天还想起你来着，所以就想着来打个招呼。
notes: 完整的轻量重连模板。
commonMistakes: Long time. I remembered you and wanted say hello.
items.contextText: 你隔了比较久再次联系一个聊得还不错的人。
